comment: Österreichische Druckschrift: K has 3 strokes. Stroke 1: vertical spine top→bottom. Stroke 2: upper arm from top-right diagonally into the spine center. Stroke 3: lower arm from spine center diagonally down to bottom-right.

strokes.comment: Upper arm: top-right diagonally in to spine midpoint
Lower arm: from spine midpoint diagonally down to bottom-right
